title: Can you stop Gendo and SEELEs plans and defeat the Angels
display_title: Can you stop Gendo and SEELEs plans and defeat the Angels
wikitext:
[]: Can you stop Gendo and SEELE's plans and defeat the Angels?             Quote Post by Shakivara777 » Wed Aug 26, 2015 1:45 pm if you were a character in evangelion World and you were an eva pilot what will you do to defeat the giant Rei ? what will you do to save the humans from turning into an orange soda XD

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:23 pm Refer to the various Super Robot Wars games. I'm pretty sure they deal with EoE at least twice.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:41 pm If it was crossover then some GAR character would save the day. If it was pure Eva, Anno wouldn't let you and would have you plot-killed :P

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:54 pm Crush the cores of the Mass Production Evas. Taking them out of the equation makes a huge difference. Rei/Lilith could probably be talked out of Instrumentality by Shinji. Unfortunately that would mean Ritsuko, Misato and a bunch of Nerv staff are probably dead for good.

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:58 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Unfortunately that would mean Ritsuko, Misato and a bunch of Nerv staff are probably dead for good.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Aug 26, 2015 4:09 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Crush the cores of the Mass Production Evas.

[]: Re: can you stop Gendo and seele plans and deafeat the Angel             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Wed Aug 26, 2015 5:01 pm Shakivara777 wrote: if you were a character in evangelion World and you were an eva pilot what will you do to defeat the giant Rei ? what will you do to save the humans from turning into an orange soda XD

[]:             Quote Post by LordThaeon » Wed Aug 26, 2015 6:25 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Agreed. Giving everyone the chance to return from Instrumentality and live again is perhaps the greatest way to thwart SEELE one could hope for

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:04 pm *Steal a Harpy.* *Fly back to NERV HQ and crush Gendo.* *Cut off the hand Gendo fused with the Adam embryo.* *Put hand-embryo on a rocket and launch it on a collision course with the nearest black hole.* Problem solved, series over.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:06 pm You will die at step one.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:11 pm Even if I did, it would still be better than living through 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Jaren000 » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:16 pm IronEvangelion wrote: *Steal a Harpy.* *Fly back to NERV HQ and crush Gendo.* *Cut off the hand Gendo fused with the Adam embryo.* *Put hand-embryo on a rocket and launch it on a collision course with the nearest black hole.* Problem solved, series over.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:32 pm ^ Lol, thanks. If you like Metal Gear Solid, make sure to check out our Video Games and Gaming subforum. We have an entire thread devoted to that series.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 27, 2015 9:54 am Misato's NGE2 Scenario approach is pretty great: Eject the pilot entry plugs, set all Evas to self-destruct (once defeating the MP Evas ) then shoot Gendo. Though, Rei still merged with Lilith, but just kinda...stood around as Seele freaked out.

[]:             Quote Post by Iuvenal » Thu Aug 27, 2015 10:26 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Misato's NGE2 Scenario approach is pretty great: Eject the pilot entry plugs, set all Evas to self-destruct (once defeating the MP Evas ) then shoot Gendo. Though, Rei still merged with Lilith, but just kinda...stood around as Seele freaked out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 27, 2015 12:15 pm If I were an Eva pilot, I'd probably be too depressed or otherwise dysfunctional to do anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 27, 2015 1:01 pm As an EVA pilot, you're in the wrong place to have much effect; your actions would be pretty much forced (stopping the Angels first, maybe using audience knowledge to win the UBF) keeping you away from where things were happening down in Terminal Dogma. Unless of course you also happen to be a magical girl or something as well (recalling one multi-xover after-the-end fic in which there's an offhand mention that the Sailor Senshi confined the interesting effects of EoE to the Tokyo-3 area). And, besides, I support the Gendo Good End outcome from EoTV.

[]: Re: can you stop Gendo and seele plans and deafeat the Angel             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Aug 27, 2015 1:42 pm Why stop it? I'm with Tines on Team Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Thu Aug 27, 2015 3:46 pm Using a dimensional vortex, steal that other Unit 0 from the Patlabor universe, stuff Ohta's soul into it and a competent pilot, and watch it curbstomp battle the MP Evas, the UN, and GNR. From a safe distance, of course, due to the MASSIVE property damage that will likely accompany the whole process.

[]: Re: can you stop Gendo and seele plans and deafeat the Angel             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 27, 2015 4:48 pm NemZ wrote: Why stop it? I'm with Tines on Team Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:23 pm
